spṛhayālu a. [spṛh-āluc] Disposed to be desirous or envious of,
(pb) longing or eager for, covetous (with dator loc.); bhogebhyaḥ spṛhayālavo na hi vayaṃ  Bh. 3. 64 ; tapovaneṣu spṛhayālureva  R. 14. 45 .
